name: New Tower Check Cashing Highland Park
description_short: MoneyGram location at New Tower Check Cashing offering check cashing, money transfers, and cash services in Highland Park, Los Angeles with extended hours.
description_long:
New Tower Check Cashing Highland Park operates as a MoneyGram agent location in the Highland Park neighborhood of Los Angeles. The business functions primarily as a check-cashing and money services outlet, leveraging MoneyGram's network to provide financial transaction services to the local community. The location has been established to serve residents and workers in the area who need quick access to cash services and money transfer capabilities.

The location offers check cashing, money transfers via MoneyGram, and cash-related services. All services require a valid legal form of ID for compliance purposes. Operating hours are extended throughout the week, with particular accommodation for Friday and Saturday customers who can access services until nearly midnight. The business maintains a physical storefront at 5401 1/2 N Figueroa Street and provides direct phone contact for customer inquiries.

What distinguishes this location is its extended operating hours compared to many traditional financial institutions. The business opens at 7:30 AM on weekdays and Saturdays (8:00 AM on Sunday) and stays open until 10:00 PM on most weekdays, extending to 11:59 PM on Friday and Saturday. This makes it accessible for customers with non-traditional schedules or those unable to visit during standard banking hours. The MoneyGram partnership provides access to international money transfer services in addition to basic check-cashing.

As a check-cashing service rather than a full-service bank, this location comes with inherent limitations. Customers should expect to pay check-cashing fees, which are not disclosed on the website. The service is transactional in nature and does not provide account-based banking services like savings or checking accounts. For consumers seeking comprehensive financial services, traditional banking relationships would be more appropriate, though this location serves an important role for unbanked or underbanked populations needing immediate cash access.
address: 5401 N Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90042

company_info.headquarters: 5401 N Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90042

pros: Extended hours until 10:00 PM weekdays and 11:59 PM Friday-Saturday for customers unable to visit during standard banking hours
MoneyGram partnership provides international money transfer capabilities beyond basic check cashing
Open Sunday 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM for weekend access to cash services
Located in Highland Park neighborhood providing local access to residents without requiring travel
Phone contact (323-254-9516) available for customer inquiries about services
Daily operation from 7:30 AM opening time accommodates early morning customer needs
Clear ID requirement stated upfront, indicating regulatory compliance and security procedures
cons: Check-cashing fees are not disclosed on website, making true cost of service unclear to customers
No account-based banking services offered—purely transactional, not suitable for customers seeking financial accounts
Website provides minimal information about specific fee structures, service limitations, or terms
Limited service offering compared to full-service banks or credit unions that offer loans, savings accounts, and other products
No online or mobile service capabilities mentioned—all transactions appear to require in-person visits
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals in Highland Park needing immediate check-cashing access
People with non-traditional work schedules requiring evening or weekend cash access
Customers needing to send international money transfers via MoneyGram network
Individuals without traditional bank accounts seeking basic cash transaction services
diagnosis: New Tower Check Cashing Highland Park is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Los Angeles area who need quick check-cashing services and international money transfers outside traditional banking hours. The main caveat is that this is a transactional service with undisclosed fee structures—it is not a substitute for a traditional bank account and should not be relied upon as a primary financial institution.
services: Bill payment (implied by standard check-cashing services)
